title: Advanced Ring Designer with Gems & Scoring
prompt:
Create an interactive 3D ring designer with gem placement and a scoring system using Three.js. Load the GLTFLoader from a CDN and the model 'BoxAnimated.glb' as a decorative display pedestal in the scene.

## Scene Setup
- Background: gradient from #1a0a2e (dark purple) to #0d0d0d (near black). Use a dark scene with ambient light (intensity 0.3, color #9966ff) and two point lights: one warm (color #ffaa44, intensity 1.2, position [5,8,5]) and one cool (color #4488ff, intensity 0.8, position [-5,6,-3]).
- Camera: PerspectiveCamera at position [0, 3, 6], looking at origin.
- OrbitControls: enabled, with autoRotate off by default, min/max distance 3-12.
- Load 'BoxAnimated.glb' using GLTFLoader. Place it at position [-4, 0, -2] scaled to 0.5. Play its animation if it has one. This serves as a decorative animated pedestal.

## Ring Model (Procedural)
- Create a torus geometry (radius 1.2, tube 0.15, radialSegments 32, tubularSegments 100) centered at origin, y=1.5. This is the ring band.
- Default ring material: MeshStandardMaterial with metalness 0.95, roughness 0.1, color #ffd700 (gold).
- The ring has 8 gem slots evenly spaced around the top half of the torus (from angle -PI/3 to PI/3). Each slot is a small sphere (radius 0.02) positioned on the ring surface to indicate placement points.

## Ring Materials (3 options)
- Gold: color #ffd700, metalness 0.95, roughness 0.1, score multiplier 1.0
- Platinum: color #e5e4e2, metalness 0.98, roughness 0.05, score multiplier 1.5
- Rose Gold: color #b76e79, metalness 0.9, roughness 0.15, score multiplier 1.2

## Gem Types (4 options)
- Diamond: IcosahedronGeometry(0.12, 0), color #ffffff, emissive #aaddff, score value 100
- Ruby: OctahedronGeometry(0.1, 0), color #ff0033, emissive #ff0000, score value 75
- Emerald: BoxGeometry(0.14, 0.14, 0.14), color #00cc44, emissive #00ff00, score value 60
- Sapphire: DodecahedronGeometry(0.11, 0), color #0044ff, emissive #0033cc, score value 85

## Scoring System
- Base score = sum of all placed gem values × ring material multiplier
- Combo bonus: if 3+ adjacent slots have the same gem type, add 50 bonus per matching gem
- Symmetry bonus: if the gem pattern is symmetric (slot i matches slot 7-i for i=0..3), add 200 bonus
- Total score = (base score + combo bonus + symmetry bonus)
- Design rating: 0-200 = 'Bronze', 201-500 = 'Silver', 501-900 = 'Gold', 901+ = 'Platinum'

## UI Elements (HTML overlay)
- Top-left: HUD panel showing 'Score: X', 'Rating: Y', 'Gems Placed: Z/8'
- Bottom: toolbar with buttons:
  - Material selector: 3 buttons labeled 'Gold', 'Platinum', 'Rose Gold'
  - Gem selector: 4 buttons labeled 'Diamond', 'Ruby', 'Emerald', 'Sapphire'
  - 'Clear All' button to remove all gems
  - 'Auto Rotate' toggle button
  - 'Randomize' button to fill all slots randomly
- Each button should have id attributes: 'btn-gold', 'btn-platinum', 'btn-rosegold', 'btn-diamond', 'btn-ruby', 'btn-emerald', 'btn-sapphire', 'btn-clear', 'btn-rotate', 'btn-randomize'
- Currently selected material and gem should be visually highlighted (brighter border)

## Interactions
- Click a gem type button to select it as active gem
- Click on a gem slot on the ring (raycasting) to place the active gem there. If a gem already exists, replace it.
- Right-click on a placed gem to remove it
- Keyboard 'R' toggles auto-rotate
- Keyboard '1','2','3','4' selects gem types (Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Sapphire)
- Keyboard 'C' clears all gems
- After every gem placement/removal, recalculate the score immediately

## State Management (window.__3D_STATE__)
Expose the following on window.__3D_STATE__:
- ringMaterial: string ('gold'|'platinum'|'rosegold'), default 'gold'
- selectedGem: string ('diamond'|'ruby'|'emerald'|'sapphire'), default 'diamond'
- gems: array of 8 elements, each null or string gem type name, default all null
- gemsPlaced: number (count of non-null gems), default 0
- baseScore: number
- comboBonus: number
- symmetryBonus: number
- totalScore: number
- rating: string ('Bronze'|'Silver'|'Gold'|'Platinum')
- materialMultiplier: number (1.0, 1.5, or 1.2)
- autoRotate: boolean, default false
- modelLoaded: boolean, true when BoxAnimated.glb finishes loading
- slotPositions: array of 8 {x,y,z} objects representing slot world positions
- animationPlaying: boolean, true if the loaded model animation is playing
physics_constraints: Gems must snap to exact slot positions on the ring torus surface. Score calculations must be deterministic and NaN-free. Material multiplier must match the selected material exactly. Combo detection must check adjacency correctly (wrapping is NOT applied - slots 0 and 7 are not adjacent). Symmetry check compares slot[i] with slot[7-i] for i in 0..3.
